programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist must stop a devastating earthquake from ripping the Earth apart.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson
programme.desc: Comedy drama as Robert Carlyle plays Barney Thomson, a downtrodden barber who has fallen from grace in his meagre barbering life. One day whilst almost losing his job, Barney comically falls into the unthinkable role of a serial killer. As he sweats out his predicament, and attempts to clumsily cover his tracks, a police detective investigating a series of murders in the area begins to suspect Barney may not be all he appears to be. All the while Barneys mother Cemolina cheerfully emasculates her son, setting off a bloody chain of events.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Arriving at a rambling, isolated house for her first nightshift, young carer Emily is left alone to face a terrifying vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: When NYC money launderer Moe Diamond (Liam Hemsworth - The Hunger Games) wakes up from a car crash, he's left with no memory, millions in stolen cash, and an insane crew of dirty cops hunting him down. With a stranger (Emory Cohen - Lords of Chaos) who says he's his best friend and a fiance he doesn't remember, Moe must race against the clock to discover his own identity and escape his past.

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job
programme.desc: A remarkable true story of the largest heist in English legal history. Four ageing East End criminals led by 76 year-old Brian Reader (Larry Lamb) drill into a steel-and-concrete secured safety deposit vault in Londons Hatton Garden jewellery quarter. With everyone from the Hungarian mob to Scotland Yard on their tail, will they commit the crime of the century or pay with their lives?

programme.title: Death of Me
programme.desc: A dream vacation in the South Pacific becomes a torturous nightmare in this high stakes horror from director Darren Lynn Bousman (The SAW Franchise). Christine (Maggie Q - Fantasy Island) and Neil (Luke Hemsworth - Thor: Ragnarok) awake on their dream vacation to a hangover and no recollection of the night before. The only clue to the horrors that transpired is a tape of Neil killing Christine.

programme.title: Initiation
programme.desc: Carefree partying turns sinister in this edgy slasher that sees Whiton University unravel on the night a star-athlete is murdered in the wake of a buried assault allegation. As a masked killer targets students, a trio of sorority sisters race to uncover the schools dark secrets. Starring Yancy Butler (Kick-Ass), Lochlyn Munro (Riverdale) and Jon Huertas (This Is Us).

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Haley is as anti-marriage as it gets, but when she tries on her grandma's ‘magical' wedding veil, she's transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Nights and Weekends
programme.desc: In her directorial debut, Greta Gerwig stars as Mattie, a New York resident who over the course of a year desperately tries to navigate through the struggles of a long-distance relationship with her partner, James, who lives in Chicago.

programme.title: Granada Nights
programme.desc: A British tourist is stuck in Granada, Spain with a broken heart. Feeling lost and abandoned, he befriends a group of young foreigners and crashes into the heart of the international student scene.

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: Save The Wedding
programme.desc: Meg and Tyler have never gotten along with each other but when they work together to save the best friends' wedding, they discover they actually make a good team and begin a little romance of their own.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Horse Camp – A Love Tail
programme.desc: It's a new year at summer horse-riding camp but everything is different this time-a new head counselor, new friends to make, and to spice things up, the ranch hand has a crush on the head riding instructor. When he is too nervous to reveal his feelings, the campers put competition aside and rally together to help him win over her heart while building friendships that will last a lifetime.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Fatal Honeymoon
programme.desc: True story: Newlywed dies on honeymoon, husband's guilt investigated.

programme.title: 'Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Philadelphia critic suspects cheating husband, hires investigator with own agenda.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets by The Lake
programme.desc: Original idea by LMN & Harlequin uncovers Thornwood Heights' murder secrets.

programme.title: Fatal Honeymoon
programme.desc: True story: Newlywed dies on honeymoon, husband's guilt investigated.

programme.title: Sisters of the Groom
programme.desc: Jason ropes his neighbor Sarah into pretending to be his girlfriend for his brother's wedding but his prying sisters suspect something is amiss.

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Pete and DeeDee have an announcement for the Gamma brothers. Across campus, Sarah struggles with her new living situation.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Sydney White

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: Worlds collide when pragmatic New Yorker and fiery Latina impulsively marry.

programme.title: Hannie Caulder
programme.desc: After she is raped by the trio of outlaw brothers who murdered her husband, a frontierswoman hires a bounty hunter to instruct her in the use of a gun so she can exact her revenge.

programme.title: Bullwhip
programme.desc: In order to avoid the hangman's noose, a cowboy agrees to marry a beautiful but fiery redhead.

programme.title: Heads or Tails
programme.desc: Shanda is charged with the murder of the banker, Burton and to save her from being lynched, the sheriff sends her off to Phoenix. During the trip the two deputies to whom she's been entrusted rape and leave her in the desert, certain that she's dead. The girl is found by Black Talisman, an outlaw, who takes her to his hideout, nurses her back to health and after hearing her story, determines to avenge her and clear her name.

programme.title: Hour of Death
programme.desc: Bob Carey, fresh out of jail, goes in search of his fiancée and soon learns that she has married a wealthy farmer.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: GENEVIEVE
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Geordie
programme.desc: "Geordie" is a charming love story set in the Highlands of Scotland. It tells the story of a very small boy who feels that the girl he loves will ignore him because of his size. So he takes a correspondence course in body-building, becoming one of the tallest and strongest men in Scotland and an expert at throwing the hammer.

programme.title: IT'S NOT CRICKET
programme.desc: Major Bright and Captain Early are planning to capture a fugitive Nazi who has stolen the famous Rothstein diamond and hidden it in a hollow cricket ball. As Bright and Early search for the Nazi, will they realise they have the valuable cricket ball?

programme.title: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: The scene is Freetown, Sierra Leone, in the year 1942. Harry Scobie, Deputy Commissioner of Police, is nearing the end of 15 years' exemplary service. Scobie is a remarkable man - honest, upright and industrious. His chief failing is a passionate pity for the unhappy, the oppressed and the weak and it is this pity which causes him to commit his first offence and leads to his ultimate downfall.

programme.title: HAMLET
programme.desc: Multi award-winning film of the classic Shakespearean ‚Äòplay within a play'.

programme.desc: In an escalating battle of two minds, a reclusive programmer is plunged into a terrifying, mind-bending revelation as he becomes exposed to the social engineering of his own sentient AI. Award-winning hand drawn animation.

programme.title: Paradise Hills
programme.desc: A young woman named Uma (Emma Roberts) wakes one morning in Paradise Hills, where well-off families send their daughters to become the perfect version of themselves. But behind all this "perfection" lies a sinister secret. Milla Jovovich also stars.

programme.title: These Final Hours
programme.desc: A self-obsessed young man makes his way to the party-to-end-all-parties on the last day on Earth, but ends up saving the life of a little girl searching for her father. Their relationship ultimately leads him on the path to redemption.

programme.title: Here Alone
programme.desc: A young woman struggles to survive alone in the woods after a mysterious epidemic decimates society. Bleak, gritty, and teeming with fear, HERE ALONE tells a story of survival and emotional redemption in a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue. Meanwhile, Georgie may be forced to give up something she loves when a demanding new Extreme Team coach arrives on the scene. Then, Lou has to decide whether she should tackle a new business venture that may take her away from the Heartland family. When Jack and Mitch work together with the herd, Tim is not ready to be pushed aside. And Georgie and Adam find the perfect way to celebrate an anniversary.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty performs life-saving surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work around-the-clock to bottle feed the mare's twin foals. Meanwhile, Georgie's new coach overhears Georgie confront Sam when she suspects her of sabotage during an Extreme Team practice, and Sam blames Georgie when she loses her headliner status. Forced together on a trail ride, Lou and Mitch come to terms with their mutual attraction and Lou reaches a decision about her future. Adam pushes Georgie to dig deep when she has to write an essay on her “most memorable moment.” And when the goldfish Tim buys for Katie suddenly dies, Tim and Jack struggle with how to break the news to her.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim is caught in the middle of Jade's showdown with a new hotshot bronc rider. Meanwhile, Georgie is feeling trapped in a rivalry of her own with Adam. Amy and Jack work with a top-flight bronc that has lost his mojo, while Ty faces a dilemma when a new professional passion project threatens to upend his life with Amy. And old feelings are rekindled when Casey enlists Tim's help with a new rodeo school student.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty reach a difficult decision about their future, the Heartland family grapples with the implications of their choice. Meanwhile, Georgie and Jade convince Tim to hire them to work at Maggie's, and Ty and Amy work together to save Casey's barrel racing horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition, while the arrival of a former girlfriend forces Tim to see his current relationship in a new light. Meanwhile, Georgie's attempt to help Olivia backfires when it threatens Adam's campaign for class president. And Jack's missing cell phone creates a rift with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie's school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam. Meanwhile, a shocking announcement from Caleb makes Ty question why Amy hasn't told him some important news. And Jack hires new help for Heartland after a close call puts several horses in danger.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York she is forced to confront two interlopers: Heartland's new ranch hand, and a trendy food truck that is threatening Maggie's business. Meanwhile, Amy struggles to help a challenging client regain her confidence. Then, after Georgie insists that she and Adam are nothing more than “friends,” she is devastated when she sees him at a party with another girl. And Tim makes a difficult decision about his future.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand, and they both reveal the circumstances of their recent pasts. While helping Amy treat a client horse, Ty feels conflicted about opening a mysterious package that has ties to his troubled past. And Jack and Lisa cope with a health scare, while Georgie and Adam deal with the fallout from Adam's kiss with another girl.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While trying to help Cass learn to handle a spirited horse, Amy discovers there is more riding on their success than she initially realized. Meanwhile, Tim insists the entire Heartland family attend a Hudson holiday party where Lou is forced to deal with a series of unexpected events, not the least of which is Peter's sudden appearance. When tragedy strikes at the Wildlife Reserve, Georgie risks her life to save a herd of miniature horses and Ty steps in to offer support when Bob's dream of expanding the Reserve goes up in smoke. Meanwhile, when Remi destroys his new fly-fishing bait supplies, Jack holds onto his grudge against the dog in order to win a bet with Lisa.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Weeks Of War

programme.title: Weeks Of War

programme.title: Weeks Of War

programme.title: Weeks Of War

programme.title: Weeks Of War

programme.title: Empress Who Rules The World
programme.desc: She's probably the most controversial woman in Chinese history – Wu Zetian, who rose from lowly concubine to become the only woman in all Chinese history to dare to take the title “Emperor” With hands-on investigations and access to the treasures of Wu Zetian's time, this film tries to give a definitive answer to the question: was Emperor Wu an evil tyrant or one of the most successful rulers in all Chinese history?

programme.title: The Pamir Highway
programme.desc: The Central Asian Pamir Highway has many surprises in store for its travellers. Our journey will take us some 1,300 kilometres, beginning in Tajikistan, then down the River Panj along the border with Afghanistan and on to Kyrgyzstan.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Food: Human life today would be very different if our ancestors had not stopped hunting animal protein. In the Fertile Crescent - known today as the Middle East - humans travelled in nomadic groups of hunter-gatherers and ate what they killed.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Covering: When our ancestors saw how other animals kept warm in sub-freezing temperatures, they started hunting them for their hides and fur. As hominid evolution was diverging from other primates, they lost their thick covering of fur when the mercury dropped.

programme.title: Born to Fly
programme.desc: We envy birds, watching them enjoy the freedom of a 3 dimensional space. Flight allows them to get to hard to reach places and preform aerial acrobatics in protecting home ranges and searching for food.

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Asia: China and India are the world's two most populous countries. They are also burdened with two of the most famous ‘hot' deserts - the Gobi desert in Mongolia-China and the Thar desert in India-Pakistan. Most people do not think of China as a desert nation - and yet it is among the world's largest. A staggering third of China's land area, 2.5 million square kilometres, is useless sand.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: Episode 1: The Rise Of Civilization
programme.desc: About 8,000 BC, in a few select places some people begin to experiment with a new way of harvesting energy. They're growing their own crops.

programme.title: Episode 2: The Age Of Discovery
programme.desc: Columbus has no idea that because of Earth's geology and geography he won't get to his destination…or how that failure made his voyage one of the most influential.

programme.title: Episode 3: The Industrial Revolution And Modern Warfare
programme.desc: How do prehistoric forests link to the development of steam engines, and the rise of modern industry?

programme.title: King without a Crown
programme.desc: "King Without a Crown" explores the story of King Constantine II of Greece, who reigned for just three years before being ousted by a military coup in 1967. The film traces his rise as a beloved young monarch, his downfall due to political inexperience, and the abolition of the monarchy. After decades in exile, Constantine returns to Greece, reflecting on his legacy and the future of the country.

programme.title: Fergie: The Downfall of a Duchess

programme.title: The Splendour and Misery of the Last Tsarinas
programme.desc: "Splendour and Misery of the Last Tsarinas" tells the stories of German princesses who became Russian Tsarinas, starting with Princess Charlotte of Prussia. From Catherine the Great to the last Empress, these women were bound by strategic marriages, torn between duty and personal desires. The film focuses on Charlotte's life, interweaving the dramatic experiences of other Tsarinas. Love, power, and tragedy mark their paths amidst European politics.

programme.title: The Mystery Of The Last Shah Of Iran

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Bucketlist South America
programme.desc: One of the biggest continents crammed with adventures and possibilities, South America should be up there on any wildlife watcher's bucket list. From record breaking rivers and longest mountain ranges to the steepest waterfalls and most massive rainforests, the variety of landscapes supports a seemingly endless diversity of wildlife. Here you can find the biggest rodents, otters and parrots, with unique mammals and marine life and spectacular predators. Make sure you don't miss South America!

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The "Parque Natural da Ria Formosa" is one of the largest lagoon conservation areas in Europe. Bordered by five natural islands. A mosaic of sandbanks, brackish and freshwater lagoons and salt marshes. In 2010, the "Ria Formosa" was chosen as one of the seven natural wonders of Portugal. It is a unique ecosystem: in the winter months, more than 20,000 birds gather here. In addition, the nature park has one of the largest seahorse populations internationally. More than half of all fish species in the Atlantic are said to spawn in the lagoon. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: The most spectacular change of seasons
programme.desc: This film explores Central Europe and presents the nature from a perspective you have never seen before. Fascinating landscape footage in high-quality HD technology, coupled with spectacular Cineflex aerial views, take us on a journey through the hitherto unknown blazes of colour of the Central European region and its inhabitants. We show you paradise on earth and demonstrate how climate and astronomy determine our life cycle. While seasons change, we visit several different European habitats that - in their diversity, are exemplary of a Central European region. Mountains, water, forests and meadows: we return to each of these habitats at different times of the year and show how the rhythm of life of each of our protagonists follows nature's clock. The four seasons determine all of the coming and passing away a highly complex interplay in the universe of life. We explore the wondrous worlds of the mysterious cycle of nature together with extraordinary people. Breathtaking landscapes enable us to experience the change of seasons at first hand.

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: This foray through northern realms of our planet above the polar circle takes us to a part of our world especially affected by climate change. The often-cited adaptability of animals could also enable them to survive under new conditions. The camera team made this foray through the polar region, from Canada to Norway, to document that, which in the opinion of many nature researchers, will no longer be visible in 30 to 50 years' time. Following the observation of ice bear mother with her young in Canada's Wapusk National Park at Hudson Bay, is a herd of harp seals on the ice during the breeding season. The Arctic Ocean ringed seals in Hudson Bay, on the other hand, prefer solitude. Should the offspring be born in an extremely cold night, they often freeze to death. Their bodies sink to the seabed at the beginning of spring when the pack ice thaws. Scavengers like the rare Greenland shark, who sees them as a welcome snack, quickly eats them. Underwater footage of this process also attempted by our camera team, very rarely succeeds.

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Rewilding: Back to Nature
programme.desc: Worldwide, there are various projects and approaches to give nature more space again. The aim is to create larger wilderness areas that develop with hardly any influence of humans - by reintroducing so-called key animal species and creating a network of wilderness corridors across entire continents. Rewilding promises to be a cost-effective form of conservation in which we can boost biodiversity and protect the climate.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere. (S4 E04)

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes. (S4 E01)

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it's vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won't want to miss.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it's all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh discover Appalachian Mountain Music and clogging in the Blue Ridge mountains of Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: Danny and Mara try their luck in the Flip Side of Florida, Jacksonville.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida Charleston, South Carolina and Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors' tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh visit Lafayette, Louisiana where they take a deep dive into Zydeco music and local crawfish with Grammy-winning musician Chubby.

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: Near Colorado National Monument, Raheim teaches amateur weightlifter Jaime how to leverage her strength on the Millennium Falcon, a red sandstone overhang. In Rabbit Valley, they rip through epic desert trails on off-road vehicles. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: At Lunch Loops, Raheim keeps young actor Shaquille on his toes as they conquer switchbacks, rock gardens, and steep drops. They also SUP in the nearby Colorado River and dig into delicious local eats at Bin 707. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: In mile-high alpine forests near Grand Junction, Raheim encourages IT analyst Bill to get back on the bike following an accident that left him with multiple broken bones. They also ride ski lifts, kayak lakes of snowmelt, and sip lavender gin. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Venturing Out: Park 2 Park
programme.desc: Touring Delaware, Raheim pushes Tatyanna to her limits above the trees before coming back to the ground to get a little history lesson and a fantastic local brew. And in this episode of firsts, Raheim is on his own to catch some waves. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Eva rediscovers her love for a classic century-old dish in her hometown Vienna. Meanwhile, Beijing's charming autumn season sets Tianran back in time as he rediscovers flavors from his childhood.

programme.title: Sweet Planet
programme.desc: From Teochew sweetrice cakes in China, sugarcane in India, to chocolate in Ivory Coast, this episode tells the story of how humans pursue and obtain sweetness, and how sweetness provides comfort and warmth to humanity.

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: Brothers Max & Benj Cave are challenged to create a unique run in an unusal setting on the Island of Jamaica.

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: In this episode the boys look back over their time spent in Portugal India Mexico Gran Canaria and Jamaica.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Local Exploring on the edge of the world as Josh is on the artic Svalbard archipelago to explore in and around Barentsburg and the Arctic Ocean.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: From Tirana, capital of old Soviet satellite Albania, Josh starts another local adventure filled with bunkers, a hidden hospital and diving in a pirate's cave.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Epic Exploring is going local again as Cody adventures in Lüderitz, Namibia going off the beaten path, through the desert and on to the ghost town of Pamona.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia explores Costa Rica, connecting with nature at Zunya, experiences a cacao ceremony with the Maleku Tribe, and finds wellness in Tamarindo's Cala Luna. At La Senda, she learns to appreciate nature's beauty and the importance of slowing down.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia's Irish journey, meeting land enthusiasts, explored scenic spots, encounters with Ellie and Hazel, vegan delights at Cornucopia, and concluded with a reflective sunset in the Wicklow Mountains, highlighting a strong community spirit.

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: Marilia's Bali journey, focused on purification rituals, blended culture, healing, and adventure. From Tirta Empul's cleansing to exploring Ubud, embracing nature, and local traditions, she found serenity, capturing precious moments in her odyssey.

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.sub-title: Monkey Mia's Dolphins and Carnarvon's History
programme.desc: Welcome to Destination WA! Discover WA's stunning coast, from Monkey Mia's dolphins to Carnarvon's space history. Join us for an unforgettable WA Day weekend!

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.sub-title: Coral Coast's Marine Park and Perth Sites
programme.desc: Welcome to Destination WA! I'm Chrissy Morrissey. Join us as we explore the Coral Coast's Marine Park, iconic islands, and historic Perth sites.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on a two wheeled journey over the highest roads in the world, stopping in remote monasteries to learn the secrets of Buddhism's warrior demons and track down a secreted manuscript rumored to explain the lost years of Jesus.
